title: Abiraterone acetate side effects? Dad, 77 yrs old.
body:
Can anyone on Abiraterone acetate share their experience? 

Specifically wondering about side effects to be aware of? 

Dad is 77 yrs old with metastatic PC - metastasized to shoulder, hip, and abdominal lymph nodes. Prostate removed about 13 years ago. Has been on Lupron and the Joe Tippins protocol. 

Oncologist want to start him on Abiraterone acetate and low dose prednisone, in conjunction with on-going Lupron. Lupron side effects have been hot flashes, testicular shrinkage, muscle loss. 

Are the Abiraterone acetate side effects different from the side effects of the Lupron? 

Thanks so much in advance!
